SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks t JOIN genres g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId WHERE g.Name = 'Rock' AND t.Milliseconds > 300000
SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tracks WHERE TrackId NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT TrackId FROM invoice_items)
SQL query to find best-selling track per distinct billing country (24 countries total in invoices)
SQLite .tables command result: albums, artists, customers, employees, genres, invoice_items, invoices, media_types, playlist_track, playlists, tracks
GitHub repository https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database confirms it is a real, public sample database based on iTunes library data

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly-available sample database based on actual iTunes library data, hosted at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. It contains 11 tables including 3503 tracks across 25 genres, 412 invoices, and 18 existing playlists. Ground truth for the task: Long Rock Anthems should contain 407 rock tracks exceeding 5 minutes duration; Hidden Gems should contain 1519 never-purchased tracks; Global Bestsellers should contain 24 tracks (one per distinct billing country with tie-breaking by lowest TrackId). All metadata paths are correctly specified in task.json.
